item.title: He experienced the cognitive dissonance a lot of us went through so long ago we don’t even remember: the tolerance of extreme mi...
item.description:
He experienced the cognitive dissonance a lot of us went through so long ago we don’t even remember: the tolerance of extreme militarism into our society.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s racist to condemn people that are happier a racist is gone
item.description:
It’s racist to condemn people that are happier a racist is gone. My thoughts and prayers are in fact with the victims of Lindsey Graham’s policies, and I truly hope they have enough food and beverage for the party they deserve.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s almost like we neeed a systematic change… that starts with taking back the unearned trillions of our oligarchs
item.description:

item.title: There’s actually such an incredibly large amount of things but I don’t think it’s being talk enough about just how spiritually I...
item.description:
There’s actually such an incredibly large amount of things but I don’t think it’s being talk enough about just how spiritually Israeli clavicle is AND WHY.

item.title: We should be no more interested in understanding people that took trips to concentration camps and did nothing than understandin...
item.description:
We should be no more interested in understanding people that took trips to concentration camps and did nothing than understanding those that visited Israel on a paid for propaganda tour and did nothing
